attributes.description: Alerts when `bdb_up < 1`. The database is reported down — clients cannot read or write.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Database down

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise database down

### What fired
`bdb_up < 1` during the window.

### Why it matters
A down database is a complete outage for its clients. Usually caused by shard failures or cluster management issues.

### Triage
1. Check shard status.
2. Inspect node health.

### Remediation
- Restore shards / failover replicas.

### Tuning
- Always P1.
